content: Beginner Home Full Body Workout (30 min): Warm-up 5 min (jumping jacks, arm circles). 1) Bodyweight Squats 3x15, 2) Push-ups (or knee push-ups) 3x10, 3) Lunges 3x12 each leg, 4) Plank 3x30sec, 5) Glute Bridge 3x15, 6) Mountain Climbers 3x20. Cool-down 5 min stretching. Rest 30-45 sec between sets.

Beginner Gym Full Body Workout (45 min): Warm-up 5 min treadmill. 1) Leg Press 3x12, 2) Lat Pulldown 3x12, 3) Dumbbell Bench Press 3x10, 4) Seated Cable Row 3x12, 5) Leg Curls 3x12, 6) Dumbbell Shoulder Press 3x10, 7) Plank 3x30sec. Cool-down stretching. Rest 60 sec between sets.

PPL Split (Intermediate): PUSH (Mon/Thu) - Bench Press 4x8, Incline DB Press 3x10, Shoulder Press 3x10, Lateral Raises 3x15, Tricep Pushdowns 3x12, Dips 3x10. PULL (Tue/Fri) - Deadlifts 4x6, Barbell Rows 4x8, Pull-ups 3x8, Face Pulls 3x15, Barbell Curls 3x10. LEGS (Wed/Sat) - Squats 4x8, Romanian DL 3x10, Leg Press 3x12, Leg Curls 3x12, Calf Raises 4x15.

HIIT Workout (20 min, no equipment): 40 sec work, 20 sec rest, 4 rounds. Round exercises: 1) Burpees, 2) High Knees, 3) Jump Squats, 4) Mountain Climbers, 5) Push-ups. Rest 1 min between rounds. Burns 250-400 calories. Great for weight loss. Do 3x per week maximum with rest days between.

Morning Yoga Routine (20 min): 1) Sun Salutation x5 (5 min), 2) Warrior I & II (2 min each side), 3) Triangle Pose (1 min each side), 4) Tree Pose (1 min each side), 5) Downward Dog (2 min), 6) Cobra Pose (1 min), 7) Child's Pose (2 min), 8) Savasana (3 min). Great for flexibility, stress relief, and morning energy.

Core/Abs Workout (15 min): 1) Plank 3x45sec, 2) Bicycle Crunches 3x20, 3) Leg Raises 3x15, 4) Russian Twists 3x20, 5) Dead Bug 3x12 each side, 6) Side Plank 2x30sec each side, 7) Mountain Climbers 3x20. Rest 20-30 sec between exercises. Do 3-4x per week for visible abs (diet is 80% of the battle).

Upper/Lower Split (4 days): UPPER A - Bench Press 4x8, Barbell Rows 4x8, OHP 3x10, Pull-ups 3x8, Curls 3x12, Tricep Dips 3x12. LOWER A - Squats 4x8, RDL 3x10, Leg Press 3x12, Calf Raises 4x15, Plank 3x45sec. Schedule: Mon-Upper, Tue-Lower, Wed-Rest, Thu-Upper, Fri-Lower, Sat/Sun-Rest.

Full Body Stretching Routine (15 min): Hold each stretch 30 sec. 1) Neck rolls, 2) Shoulder cross-body stretch, 3) Tricep overhead stretch, 4) Chest doorway stretch, 5) Cat-cow stretch, 6) Seated forward fold, 7) Butterfly stretch, 8) Quad stretch (standing), 9) Hamstring stretch, 10) Calf stretch, 11) Hip flexor lunge stretch, 12) Child's pose.
